select.heading: Import backup
select.description: Select the Phylax backup file you created earlier. The backup is decrypted with the password it was created with.

overwrite-warning.title: Warning: import replaces existing data
overwrite-warning.body: Your current Phylax profile will be fully replaced by the import. This action cannot be undone.
overwrite-warning.acknowledge: I understand that the data will be overwritten.

unlock.heading: Unlock backup
unlock.description: Enter the password this backup was created with. After import, this password becomes your master password.

error.invalid-json: The selected file is not valid JSON.
error.wrong-type: This is not a Phylax backup file.
error.too-large: File too large ({{size}} MB). Maximum 50 MB allowed.
error.wrong-password: Wrong password. Backup could not be decrypted.
